title: Anomaly Detector
description: A filter component that monitors pipeline output values over time and
detects statistical anomalies using z-score, IQR, or rolling average
deviation. It maintains a sliding window of recent outputs for baseline
computation and flags anomalous values with severity levels (info,
warning, critical). Configurable sensitivity, window size, and detection
method allow fine-tuned monitoring of token counts, response lengths,

input.description: Pipeline output to monitor for anomalies

anomaly_detector.method.title: Detection method
anomaly_detector.method.description: Statistical method used to detect anomalies.

anomaly_detector.sensitivity.title: Sensitivity threshold
anomaly_detector.sensitivity.description: How many standard deviations (z-score), IQR multipliers, or rolling-average ratios before a value is flagged. Lower values flag more anomalies.

anomaly_detector.windowSize.title: Window size
anomaly_detector.windowSize.description: Number of recent observations kept for baseline computation.

anomaly_detector.metric.title: Metric to monitor
anomaly_detector.metric.description: Which numeric property of the pipeline output to track.

anomaly_detector.warningThreshold.title: Warning threshold multiplier
anomaly_detector.warningThreshold.description: Multiplier applied to sensitivity to escalate from info to warning severity. Default 1.5x.

anomaly_detector.criticalThreshold.title: Critical threshold multiplier
anomaly_detector.criticalThreshold.description: Multiplier applied to sensitivity to escalate from warning to critical severity. Default 2.0x.
